text: made me speak in a chinese accent, great game

Was willing to give this game time to fix and build on top of what they have, but with the developer shunting down within 4 days of launch stating "it has failed financially, and we lack the funds to continue. All income received is being used to pay off debts to our partners." Made me feel uneasy and refunded it ASAP, I hope you all refund it otherwise you could be left with a lame duck forever more.
Relaxing game,nice map,many dlc's,trucks,city's and much more. Really worth getting if you like long drives. Recommend it for nearly anyone.

I am Commander Shepard and this is my favorite game in the galaxy.

Infinite loading screen on vr... waited for 30 minutes, everything hurts. Please only play with a NASA computer or otherwise...

Very deceptively challenging.  It combines elements of castlevania, braid, super meat boy, 1980's style and charm, with a *REALLY* good sound-track.  Total must buy for the indie game fan who just is looking for something a little strange and charming to fretter a few hours with. No, you won't get everything without losing your soul and breaking things, just go in accepting that and enjoy (9/10)
